title: The Legend of Ramayana
author: Maharishi Valmiki
description: Experience the timeless epic of Lord Rama, his journey of righteousness (Dharma), the exile, and the ultimate victory of good over evil. This series brings the ancient sanskrit epic to life with vivid storytelling and immersive soundscapes.

episodes.title: Bala Kanda: The Divine Birth
episodes.description: The story of King Dasharatha's quest for an heir and the divine birth of Rama and his brothers.

episodes.title: Ayodhya Kanda: The Exile Begins
episodes.description: Queen Kaikeyi's boons lead to Rama's 14-year exile to the Dandaka forest.

episodes.title: Aranya Kanda: Life in the Forest
episodes.description: Rama, Sita, and Lakshmana's peaceful life in the forest is interrupted by the demoness Surpanakha.

title: Birbal's Wit & Wisdom
author: Folk Tales
description: Delightful and clever tales from the court of Emperor Akbar, featuring his most trusted and intelligent advisor, Birbal. Each story is a lesson in quick thinking and common sense.

episodes.title: The Crow Count in Agra
episodes.description: Akbar challenges Birbal to count all the crows in the city of Agra.

episodes.title: The Honest Thief
episodes.description: Birbal uses a clever psychological trick to find the thief among Akbar's courtiers.

title: Indian Ghost Stories
author: Ruskin Bond
description: Spooky and atmospheric tales from the hills and plains of India, where old mansions, dark forests, and ancient spirits reside. Narrated with a haunting charm.

episodes.title: The Headless Horseman
episodes.description: A classic ghost story set in the winding roads of Mussoorie.

episodes.title: Whispers in the Pines
episodes.description: Two travelers spend a night in an abandoned dak bungalow with a dark past.

title: The Panchatantra Collection
author: Vishnu Sharma
description: Ancient animal fables from India that teach valuable life lessons about friendship, strategy, and wisdom. Perfect for young and old listeners alike.

episodes.title: The Lion and the Clever Rabbit
episodes.description: How a small rabbit defeated a mighty lion through pure intelligence.

episodes.title: The Talkative Tortoise
episodes.description: A lesson in why silence is sometimes the greatest virtue.

title: Hidden History of India
author: Dr. Aniruddha
description: Uncover the forgotten heroes, scientific discoveries, and cultural revolutions that shaped the Indian subcontinent. A deep dive into the roots of our civilization.

episodes.title: The Vedic Science of Stars
episodes.description: How ancient Indians mapped the sky thousands of years before the telescope.

episodes.title: The Mystery of the Indus Valley
episodes.description: What happened to one of the world's first and most advanced civilizations?
